detail.description:
The first co-op horror extraction game on mobile, with full PC cross-play. Squad up, loot cursed ruins, escape alive — and try not to die laughing.

CO-OP HORROR EXTRACTION — NOW ON MOBILE
The horror extraction genre finally comes to your phone, and it's finally fun for everyone. No hardcore grind. No steep learning curve. Just you, your friends, and a cursed ancient ruin full of things that want to eat you. Drop in with up to 4 players, loot cursed tombs, and extract before ancient horrors end
detail.recentChanges:
We're happy to announce that Tomb Busters is officially launched!

Join the adventure in the first co-op comedy horror extraction game on mobile.
Gather your friends, loot ancient ruins, and escape alive — and try not to die laughing!
